problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Combining Spintronics for low-power data storage with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
